methodology_sections: 1. Conservation Laws - Solvency, inflation checks, supply integrity
2. Relationship & Ratio Invariants - Collateralization, rate consistency
3. Economic Monotonicity - Yield accumulation, exchange rate direction
4. Incentive & Game Theoretic Integrity - Attack cost vs profit, slashing
5. Fee & Yield Consistency - Fee accounting, yield distribution

invariants.description: The actual ERC20 balance of the PaymentEscrow contract must always be greater than or equal to the tracked synced balance.
invariants.attack_scenario: If the contract is insolvent, users cannot stop rentals and reclaim their funds, leading to locked NFTs and lost payments.
invariants.solidity_property: function invariant_escrow_solvency(address token) public view { assert(IERC20(token).balanceOf(address(this)) >= balanceOf(token)); }

invariants.description: During a pro-rata settlement, the sum of the amounts distributed to the renter and lender must exactly equal the payment amount being settled.
invariants.attack_scenario: Rounding errors in pro-rata calculation could leave dust in the contract or attempt to distribute more tokens than available, causing settlement to revert and locking the rental.
invariants.solidity_property: function invariant_pro_rata_conservation(uint256 amount, uint256 elapsedTime, uint256 totalTime) public pure { (uint256 r, uint256 l) = _calculatePaymentProRata(amount, elapsedTime, totalTime); assert(r + l == amount); }

invariants.description: The rentedAssets mapping must accurately reflect active rentals. It must strictly be greater than 0 if an order containing the asset is active.
invariants.attack_scenario: If an attacker can manipulate rentedAssets to 0 while the rental is still active, they can bypass the Guard and transfer the NFT out of the Safe.
invariants.invariant_logic: If Storage.orders[orderHash] == true, then for all items in order, Storage.rentedAssets[rentalId] >= item.amount
invariants.solidity_property: function invariant_rented_assets_match_orders(bytes32 orderHash, RentalId rentalId) public view { if(orders[orderHash]) { assert(rentedAssets[rentalId] > 0); } }

invariants.description: Protocol fees are implicitly stored as the difference between the actual balance and the synced balance. This difference should only grow during normal operations and only decrease during skim.
invariants.attack_scenario: An attacker exploits a rounding error or settlement bug to drain accumulated protocol fees.
invariants.invariant_logic: delta(IERC20(token).balanceOf(address(this)) - balanceOf[token]) >= 0 for all functions except skim()
invariants.solidity_property: function invariant_fee_monotonicity(address token) public { uint256 preFee = IERC20(token).balanceOf(address(this)) - balanceOf(token); /* execute non-skim tx */ uint256 postFee = IERC20(token).balanceOf(address(this)) - balanceOf(token); assert(postFee >= preFee); }

invariants.description: A rental order must only be stopped once. The order hash must exist in Storage.orders to be stopped, and is deleted immediately.
invariants.attack_scenario: An attacker stops a rental multiple times to drain the PaymentEscrow of ERC20 tokens and underflow the rentedAssets mapping.
invariants.invariant_logic: Storage.orders[orderHash] == true before stopRent, and Storage.orders[orderHash] == false after stopRent
invariants.solidity_property: function invariant_single_stop(bytes32 orderHash) public { bool preStatus = STORE.orders(orderHash); /* execute stop */ bool postStatus = STORE.orders(orderHash); assert(preStatus == true && postStatus == false); }

invariants.description: The Guard must revert any transaction that attempts to transfer or approve an NFT that is currently marked as rented out in Storage.
invariants.attack_scenario: If the Guard fails to block the transfer, the renter can steal the NFT from the rental Safe, causing a total loss of the lender's asset.
invariants.invariant_logic: If Storage.isRentedOut(safe, token, tokenId) == true, then Guard.checkTransaction(..., transfer_selector, ...) reverts
invariants.solidity_property: function invariant_guard_blocks_active_rentals(address safe, address token, uint256 tokenId, bytes calldata data) public { if (STORE.isRentedOut(safe, token, tokenId)) { vm.expectRevert(); guard.checkTransaction(..., data, ...); } }
